domain: Fintech / E-wallet / Recharge / MLM E-commerce SaaS
design_philosophy: A modern, mobile-first fintech dashboard designed for rapid execution and clear data correlation. Uses E1's 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard to manage complex wallets, 20-level refer schemas, and recharges cleanly without cognitive overload. The primary visual tension comes from deep ocean blue (Trust) paired with vibrant emerald green (Performance/Money) against stark white backgrounds.

typography.general_rules: Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use Outfit for high-impact numbers and headings. Apply 'tracking-tight' for all headings above 32px. Use 'font-black' for wallet balances.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-4, p-6 for mobile, p-8, p-12 for desktop containers.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap strategy: gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Main charts/tables take col-span-2 or 3. Wallet summary takes col-span-1.
layout_and_spacing.container_borders: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-First. Start with grid-cols-1. Left-align dense content/labels. Center-align only for empty states or success messages.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.wallet_cards: Glassmorphism over abstract mesh gradient. Use bg-black/60 (or dark blue), backdrop-blur-xl, backdrop-saturate-150, border-white/20, text-white. Drop shadow: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)].
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_widgets: Flat solid background (bg-card), sharp 1px border (border-border), no shadow by default. On hover: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glass sticky header. bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-border/40.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md. Secondary buttons: outline border-border hover:bg-muted.

components.navigation: Bottom Navigation for Mobile (sticky, icon + label). Sidebar for Admin/Desktop (collapsible, grouping features like Recharges, Ecommerce, Referrals).
components.forms_and_auth: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Left-aligned labels. Use clear active/focus rings (ring-primary). Referral Code input should have a distinct 'gift/invite' icon inside.
components.wallet_transfer: Step-by-step or single-page wizard using Shadcn Dialog or Card. Display current balance prominently. Use 'lucide-react' arrow-right-left for transfer indication.
components.mlm_tree: 20-Level User Plan needs to be rendered as an expandable Accordion or nested list, avoiding visual clutter. Show User Avatar, Name, Level, and Commission.
components.tables: Shadcn Table for Transfer History, User Details, and Fund Request Approvals. High contrast headers. Action buttons inside rows (Approve/Reject).
components.icons: lucide-react for all standard icons. Phosphor icons for dense data viz if needed.

auth.description: Login and Signup (Refer code, full name, mobile, password).
auth.layout: Split screen on desktop (left: mesh gradient with brand logo, right: form). Full screen form on mobile.

sections: Wallet Summary (Main Wallet & E-Wallet) - Visual cards.
Quick Actions (Add Fund, Transfer to E-wallet, Mobile/DTH/Utility Recharge).
Income Stats (Total Income, Today Income, Repurchase Income) - Bento grid cards.

admin_dashboard.description: Command center for the platform admin.
sections: System Overview (Total Users, Total Main Wallet, Total E-Wallet).

mlm_ecommerce.layout: Grid of products (col-span-1 for each). Level status in a dedicated tab or sidebar showing commission tracking.

media_and_assets.logo_strategy: Combine Phosphor/Lucide 'Wallet' and 'Zap' (lightning bolt) icons with 'SmartPay360' text in Outfit font. Font color text-secondary, icons in text-primary.

images.description: Abstract mesh gradient background in blue and green, to be used on the Login/Signup split screen or as E-Wallet Card backgrounds.
Professional smiling man, to be used for User avatars in Admin User Details or downline lists.
Professional smiling woman, to be used for User avatars in downline lists.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='main-wallet-balance').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided. Do not use generic tailwind slate/blue; map the CSS variables directly.
Install and use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text.
Build Shadcn components but strip overly rounded borders (use rounded-md) to align with the 'Technical/Control Room' E1 strategy.
Implement Mobile-first views. Navigation must shift from Sidebar (Desktop) to Bottom Nav (Mobile).
Never use fully transparent backgrounds behind text over the auth_background image; always use the specified Glassmorphism rules.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk font. Use Outfit.
For the E-Wallet and Main Wallet displays, style them like digital credit cards with the mesh gradient image behind.
Ensure the Admin and User dashboards have distinct toggles or routes.
When building the MLM tree/20-level refer code, use Accordions with clear Avatar placeholders.
